title: Technology Foundation Readiness Test
description: A 50-question mock exam for validating the secure exam flow.

questions.text: Which data structure follows First In First Out order?
Which protocol is used to securely browse websites?
What does CPU stand for?
Which language is mainly used for styling web pages?
Which database type stores data in tables?
What is the time complexity of binary search on a sorted array?
Which HTTP method is normally used to create a resource?
Which component stores temporary data while a computer is running?
Which command is used to check Git working tree status?
Which concept hides internal implementation details?
Which network device forwards packets between networks?
What does API stand for?
Which one is a JavaScript package manager?
Which HTML element is used for the largest heading?
Which status code means Not Found?
Which SQL keyword retrieves rows from a table?
Which testing type checks small units of code?
Which value represents a boolean false in JavaScript?
Which storage is generally fastest?
Which algorithm technique solves a problem by calling itself?
Which CSS property controls text size?
Which tool is used to containerize applications?
Which layer encrypts HTTPS traffic?
Which command installs dependencies from package.json?
Which data format uses key-value pairs and arrays?
Which one is a NoSQL document database?
Which React hook manages component state?
Which HTTP status code means Unauthorized?
Which symbol is often used for comments in JavaScript single-line code?
Which operation adds an item to the end of a queue?
Which operating system is open source?
Which metric measures server requests per second?
Which cache is closest to the CPU?
Which one is used to uniquely identify database rows?
Which command creates a new Git branch and switches to it?
Which browser API is used to access camera and microphone?
Which one is a message queue technology?
Which concept means systems continue working after one node fails?
Which command starts many Node projects in development?
Which CSS layout system is one-dimensional?
Which one is used for real-time bidirectional communication?
Which database index improves lookup speed?
Which cloud pattern spreads traffic across servers?
Which one is a frontend build tool?
Which OS signal is often used to terminate a process?
Which strategy reduces repeated expensive reads?
Which Electron process controls native windows?
Which event is suspicious during a locked exam?
Which service is useful for publishing proctoring events at scale?
Which principle keeps exam platform data separate from LMS data?
